import pytest
from source import process_batch

def test_process_batch_processes_all_elements():
    """process_batch should process every input item, not skip the last one."""
    items = [5, 7, 9, 11]
    result = process_batch(items)
    assert len(result) == len(items), (
        f"Expected result length {len(items)}, got {len(result)}"
    )
    assert result[-1] == items[-1] * 2, (
        f"Expected last result to be {items[-1] * 2}, got {result[-1]}"
    )
